doctrine: Runtime proof remains separate from code-intelligence proof.
No game launch unless the active contract explicitly allows it.
If a command assumes Bannerlord should not be running, run ForgeStop first.
Do not commit real local secrets, tokens, saves, or machine-specific config.
AGENTS.md is the safe bootloader; the v2 skill manifest routes conditional lane knowledge.
Select one primary skill and only declared required or composed skills.
Every skill declares entry authority, validators, expected artifacts, proof ceiling, risk class, freshness source, owned paths, and forbidden paths.
Mutable PR restrictions and active targets belong in current-state packets rather than AGENTS.md.
Local artifacts are evidence-bearing events. They do not parse, route, validate, or trigger themselves.
Automatic artifact engines remain deterministic and read-only; parser success may not be promoted into build, behavior, or runtime proof.
Known launcher windows are canonical metadata identities with tracked aliases and exact action policies; they are not unnamed pictures or coordinate targets.
launcher-window-context.json is the sole authority for PLAY versus CONTINUE after the target PID and HWND are frozen.
The S1/S2 PID and window delta is a first-seen learning fallback, while image parsing remains diagnostic only.
Stale PRs are classified and selectively replayed, not blindly deleted, squashed, or used as bases.
Stale PR recovery is complete only when every planned source PR has an evidence-backed terminal disposition in the canonical progress ledger.
Continuum is an optional development accelerator, never a BlacksmithGuild build, validation, launch, or runtime dependency.
